dialogue.text: Hello there! What brings you to this part of the world?
Adventure awaits! Have you heard about the ancient ruins nearby?

responses.text: I have, but I'm not interested.

dialogue.text: Sometimes, the best adventures are found in the simplest of places.

responses.text: That's true. I'll keep my eyes open.

dialogue.text: The ruins are said to be filled with treasures and ancient secrets. Be careful, though!

responses.text: I will! Thanks for the tip.

dialogue.text: That's a shame. There are many stories waiting to be uncovered.
Safe travels, friend! May fortune smile upon you.
Goodbye, and may your journey be filled with wonder!
